category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Suriname.

title.en: China-to-Suriname EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入苏里南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入蘇里南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Suriname SSB / EAS / EBS requirements, IEC 61851 safety standards, Americas-region connector expectations (SAE J1772 AC / CCS1 DC — confirm with EAS/EBS), Suriname 127 V / 220 V 60 Hz grid conditions, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Suriname's EV market is in an early stage; this matrix reflects the technical framework as it stands in 2026 and notes where formal standards have not yet been published.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与苏里南SSB / EAS / EBS要求、IEC 61851安全标准、美洲地区接口预期（交流SAE J1772 / 直流CCS1——请向EAS/EBS确认）、苏里南127 V / 220 V 60 Hz电网条件、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。苏里南电动汽车市场尚处于起步阶段；本矩阵反映2026年的技术框架现状，并注明正式标准尚未发布之处。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與蘇里南SSB / EAS / EBS要求、IEC 61851安全標準、美洲地區接口預期（交流SAE J1772 / 直流CCS1——請向EAS/EBS確認）、蘇里南127 V / 220 V 60 Hz電網條件、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。蘇里南電動汽車市場尚處於起步階段；本矩陣反映2026年的技術框架現狀，並注明正式標準尚未發佈之處。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Suriname, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) connector hardware redesign — GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with the SAE J1772 (Type 1) AC and CCS1 DC connectors common to the Americas region; exporters must confirm the connector type required by EAS, EBS, and the specific project before quoting, as no single published Suriname national EV-charger connector standard was confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; (2) grid adaptation — Suriname operates at 127 V / 220 V single-phase and 60 Hz, requiring input-voltage and frequency confirmation different from China's 220 V / 380 V 50 Hz domestic baseline; (3) safety evidence aligned with IEC 61851 as referenced by Suriname's IEC-affiliate standards framework (SSB is an IEC Affiliate Member); (4) Dutch-language documentation required for the Suriname market; (5) EAS regulatory coordination and EBS grid-connection approval for any grid-connected installation. Suriname's EV market is nascent and formal mandatory charger certification rules had not been confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters must engage EAS and EBS directly to confirm current requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入苏里南时，已确认的实务差距包括：(1) 接口硬件重新设计——GB/T 20234接口与美洲地区通用的交流SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流CCS1接口在物理上不兼容；出口商在报价前须向EAS、EBS及具体项目确认所需接口类型，截至2026年6月14日未能从官方来源确认苏里南已发布的国家电动汽车充电桩接口标准；(2) 电网适配——苏里南采用127 V / 220 V单相、60 Hz，与中国国内220 V / 380 V 50 Hz基线不同，须确认输入电压和频率；(3) 须符合IEC 61851安全证据——苏里南标准体系（SSB为IEC联络会员）参照IEC体系；(4) 苏里南市场须提供荷兰语文件；(5) 并网安装须获得EAS监管协调和EBS电网接入批准。苏里南电动汽车市场极为初期，截至2026年6月14日未能从官方来源确认正式强制充电桩认证规则；出口商须直接与EAS和EBS联系以确认现行要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入蘇里南時，已確認的實務差距包括：(1) 接口硬件重新設計——GB/T 20234接口與美洲地區通用的交流SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流CCS1接口在物理上不兼容；出口商在報價前須向EAS、EBS及具體項目確認所需接口類型，截至2026年6月14日未能從官方來源確認蘇里南已發佈的國家電動汽車充電樁接口標準；(2) 電網適配——蘇里南採用127 V / 220 V單相、60 Hz，與中國國內220 V / 380 V 50 Hz基線不同，須確認輸入電壓和頻率；(3) 須符合IEC 61851安全證據——蘇里南標準體系（SSB為IEC聯絡會員）參照IEC體系；(4) 蘇里南市場須提供荷蘭語文件；(5) 併網安裝須獲得EAS監管協調和EBS電網接入批准。蘇里南電動汽車市場極為初期，截至2026年6月14日未能從官方來源確認正式強制充電樁認證規則；出口商須直接與EAS和EBS聯繫以確認現行要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SSB scope determination, EAS regulatory approval, EBS grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Suriname conformity assessment rules, EAS regulatory requirements, EBS grid-connection requirements, and applicable standards with qualified professionals and the relevant authorities before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SSB适用范围裁定、EAS监管批准、EBS并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士及相关主管部门核验现行苏里南合格评定规则、EAS监管要求、EBS并网要求及适用标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SSB適用範圍裁定、EAS監管批准、EBS併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士及相關主管部門核驗現行蘇里南合格評定規則、EAS監管要求、EBS併網要求及適用標準。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
